name: auto-beamer
description: AutoBeamer — AI-powered XeLaTeX Beamer slide system with layout optimizer, design grammar checker, and 6 agent skills for building academic presentations.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered Beamer slide system with layout optimizer and 6 agent skills
interface.longDescription: AutoBeamer replaces guesswork with a systematic pipeline for building academic slides. It includes a three-tier template library (themes, layouts, components), a four-layer layout optimizer, a design grammar checker, and 6 AI agent skills for creation, layout, build, review, TikZ, and validation.
defaultPrompt: Create a Beamer slide deck for my research paper
Help me design the layout for this slide
